visual_analysis: The visual presentation is clear and well-organized, using contrasting colors to differentiate between classes in the scatter plot. The layout is simple and focuses on the demo content, although additional context or design elements could enhance visual appeal.
educational_analysis: The educational concept is somewhat clear due to the scatter plot illustrating the Support Vector Machine model, but it lacks detailed instructional elements that could help users fully grasp the learning objectives. While the demo clearly visualizes data classification, more context or guidance would enhance its pedagogical effectiveness.
